A '''species''' was [[Homeworld/Legends|indigenous]] to [[Orooturoo]]. With small tentacles, four of which ended in a [[Limb/Legends|two-prong feature]], extended from a large, purple-[[Color/Legends|colored]] [[Slug (creature)|slug]]-like body, the [[Species/Legends|species]] had a [[Reproduction/Legends|mating]] ritual which involved the [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Death/Legends|devouring]] the male, similar to some [[Insect/Legends|insects]]. [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] learned of the ritual when [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Nampi]] captured him and [[Foodstuff/Legends|ate]] his [[Treason/Legends|traitorous]] [[Aide/Legends|aide]] [[Scuppa]].

{{Species-stub}}
